name: Laurentian Bank of Canada
description: Laurentian Bank of Canada is a diversified financial services provider and a Schedule 1 bank that operates primarily in the province of Quebec, with additional commercial and business banking offices located across Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, and Nova Scotia. The institution offers a wide range of financial products and services to personal, business, and institutional clients. As a publicly traded entity on the Toronto Stock Exchange, it focuses on delivering tailored banking solutions while maintaining a commitment to its core commercial businesses and digital banking initiatives.
